productDisplayName: Puma Men Drift Cat III CF Brown Sports Shoes
description: These stylish Drift cat III CF shoes from puma that have a motorsport friendly design are great for urban wear. These shoes are great for regular wear since their attractive low-profile design looks great when teamed with jeans and tees for a cool casual look. Upper Synthetic leather uppers for durability and protection Velcro flap closure for snug Fit and easy insertion and removal of the feet Lightly padded collar and tongue for greater comfort Textile lining for extra comfort Brand name embossed on the tongue, stylized cat logo on the side and cat logo on the heel counter Formstripe on the lateral side Midsole Eco-friendly EcoOrtholite insole gives breathability, moisture control, anti-microbial properties, and long term cushioning Phylon midsole for greater lightweight comfort Outsole Non-slip rubber outsole in a tyre tread pattern for greater traction Flex grooves for greater flexibility of the feet Sole extending to heel counter for greater protection of the heel
